---
title: "sv_engine.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\sv_engine.py"
loc: 171
complexity: 26
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.51
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 1.00
---

## Intent
The `sv_engine.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [personas](file://personas)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [engine](file://engine)
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [time](file://time)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
